uploaded_documents.type: 1.Income Tax Return Acknowledgement of Preceding Year 1
2. Income Tax Return Acknowledgement of Preceding Year 2
3.Income Tax Return Acknowledgement of Preceding Year 3
4.Balance Sheet
5. Architect Certificate (Form 1)
6. Engineer Certificate (Form 2)
7. CA Certificate (Form 3)
8. Copies of the registered ownership documents / Copies of the pattadar pass books issued by the Revenue department
9. Copies of the field sketches duly marking the proposed site with measurements along with combined field sketch
10. Detailed site plan showing the measurements as on ground including diagonals, Latitude and Longitude at end points of the project site
11. Commencement Certificate for previous completed projects

12. Copy of the registered development agreement between the Owner of the land and the Promoter along with the link documents / Authorisation letter given by the Land owner to undertake the construction of the building by the promoter
13. Land Title search Report from an Advocate(include Advocate Enrolment Number) having experience of at least ten years in land related matters
14.Latest (by 30 days) Encumbrance certificate (for entire period of document) issued by the Registration and Stamps department
15. Details of the cases pending before the Authorities or in Courts of Law and their current status along with the copies of the orders issued
16. Copy of the plan and proceedings issued by the competent Authority for approval of plans
17. Approved plan / list of amenities proposed in the site
18. NOC's issued by Authority
19. Detailed technical specifications of the construction if the buildings and facilities proposed in the project including brand specifications details of fixtures and fittings
20. Full address of the proposed development project along with the land mark nearby and a location plan/ Topo plan drawn to a scale
21. Licenses/Enrolment form of Civil Contractors, or turnkey contractor, or EPC Contractors.
22. Licenses/Enrolment form of Structural Engineer of the project
23. Licenses/Enrolment form of Architect or firm or company
24.Licenses/Enrolment form of Engineer or firm or company
25.Licenses/Enrolment form of Chartered Accountant or firm or company
26.Detailed estimate of the expenditure for construction of the building
27. Statement of source of funds for construction of project

28. Details of financial agreement made with any bank or other financial institution recognised by the Reserve Bank of India and of legal safeguards taken, if any, for the construction of building, or transfer of building by sale, gift or mortgage or otherwise
29.Proforma of the Allotment Letter proposed to be signed with the Allottee
30.Proforma of the Agreement for Sale proposed to be signed with the Allottee
31.Proforma of the Conveyance Deed proposed to be signed with the Allottee
32.Structural Stability Certificate duly issued by Certified Structural Consultant/Engineer along with the details of parameters followed for verification of structural stability *
34. FORM - B, Declaration, supported by an affidavit, which shall be signed by the promoter or any person authorized by the promoter under Rule 3-B(2) (a) to 0f AP Real Estate Rules-2017*
35. Brochure of Current Project
36. Existing Layout Plan
37.Change of Land Use
38. Latest Project/ Site/ Building Photo
APRERA CERTIFICATE

amenity_detail.name: Electricity Supply Transformer And Sub Station
